provenance.known_limitation_note: Scenario expects outcome='steered' with feasibility_code='codex_matcher_inert'. But the flow emits ready_to_save=True alongside the codex_matcher_inert feasibility warning, so the runner saves the policy and reports outcome='saved'. Candidate runner gap: when feasibility.class=silent_noop AND ready_to_save=True, the runner should classify as 'steered' rather than saving. Same pattern as s7-block-citations-stop-en and s8-pii-stop-block-ko (enforce_downgraded_to_audit).
